horoscope: Mars begins its transit of your solar twelfth house today, dear Aries, where it will visit until April 9th. During this transit, you may not always know how to channel your energy effectively, but you can become quite skilled at finding creative ways to deal with challenges. This is a time to reassess your goals. It's not the most decisive or energetic of times in your life, and you require a little more rest than usual. While you typically stand up for yourself and pursue your desires directly, during this cycle, you're more inclined to look at the hidden aspects of a situation and explore different routes to satisfy them. This comes at a time when Mercury is retrograde (until the 20th), reinforcing the benefits of slowing down and taking your time with decision-making. Today, conflicts or clashes may come on far too quickly and easily, but hasty moves and decisions can set you back--"haste makes waste” applies now. Especially if you’ve been building a project or a following, be careful not to throw caution to the wind now.

Mars begins transiting your solar eleventh house today, dear Taurus, bringing easier energy with you for moving your plans forward in general. This cycle lasts until April 9th can bring teamwork into stronger focus, and it can also stir a desire to oversee and organize projects. This can be a busy period when you're in bigger demand socially, and it can also be a period when you are especially motivated to create new long-term plans and even a new business. Until March 20th, Mercury is retrograde in the same sector of your solar chart, however, which can slow you down a little. Otherwise, this transit is supportive, especially energetically. Your social life is likely to be more animated. Today, watch that impatience or pride doesn’t interfere with the progress you’re making, particularly if you’ve been getting yourself settled into a better routine. It can be all too easy to react quickly and set yourself back, as impatience can work against you now.

Mars enters your solar tenth house today for a stay until April 9th, dear Gemini. This period tends to highlight increased ambition and competition, and it's good for gunning towards a particular goal. The desire to take action is strong when it comes to fulfilling your responsibilities and pushing your professional interests ahead. It's a dynamic period that may challenge you at times, but that can also be invigorating and refreshing. You may resent interference at this time, making it better to work at your own pace if possible. It's an innovative, self-starting period when you're inclined to take the initiative. You may want to watch for competitiveness that leads to conflicts or results in reputation problems, especially while Mercury is retrograde until the 20th. Today, there's some restless and impatient energy in spots. Avoid becoming misguided by sudden desires or feelings. There is a tendency to react too hastily or to fly off the handle about matters that are best handled more considerately.

Mars begins its transit of your solar ninth house today, dear Cancer, and this is a strong, energizing position for Mars. You'll find it natural to assert yourself and to pursue your desires without too many obstacles during this transit that lasts until April 9th. You'll also be more courageous than usual, so that you are more willing to seek out new adventures and experiences. You tend to move through the world at the right speed. You quite naturally contest accepted beliefs and opinions, and you can easily get worked up over differences of opinion. You begin to feel more energized, confident, and enthusiastic. Taking charge of your life comes more easily and naturally, and you believe in your dreams! Mercury is retrograde until the 20th, and small problems are likely to crop up in the weeks ahead, but with Mars now on your side, you're feeling on top of things. Today, watch for stirring up trouble or reacting too quickly to challenges with Mars and Jupiter forming a tense aspect.

Mars begins energizing your solar eighth house today, dear Leo, and you become more strategic when it comes to moving your plans forward until April 9th. It's a fine cycle for exploring an absorbing connection or project. Power politics can be stirring in a close one-to-one relationship, and sometimes this transit correlates with disputes over money. Mercury's retrograde in the same sector until the 20th can amplify misunderstandings. You can be a little more driven by instincts during this cycle. It can be a time to take the lead or take action regarding shared finances, loans, or debts. Desires run more deeply than usual, and can be quite layered and complicated. There can be stronger energy and motivation for serious study and research. Watch for the magnification of problem areas, particularly related to suspicion. Today, watch for chasing a false lead and for allowing restlessness to take over. Aim to make your enthusiasm work for you.

Mars heads into your partnership sector today, dear Virgo, animating close relationships until April 9th. Your relationships can be an area of much excitement and perhaps some commotion at times. People rile you up, frustrating you at times, and motivating you other times. Friction doesn't have to be difficult -- some "push and pull" now can eventually lead to a better sense of balance or equality. Problems that have been left unacknowledged or have been festering tend to surface so that you can take care of them once and for all. It can also be a time when you have more courage to pursue a relationship if you are identifying with the Mars energy rather than giving it away to others. Today, with Mars and Jupiter in a minor challenging aspect, impatience, restlessness, or perhaps ego can slow you down. Try to tame impulses to prove yourself, as it can cause some regret later. Because Mars is in your partnership sector, it may be that someone else is coming on too strong today. Taking the high road is more likely to work in your favor right now. However, this aspect can also be wonderfully creative, inspiring optimism if you work with it.

Mars begins its transit of your work and health sector today, dear Libra, bringing dynamic energy to these areas of life. Until April 9th, you can be super-motivated to get more work done or to take better care of your body through bolder health and nutrition programs. Difficulties arise if you feel others are pushing their work on you or telling you what to do, and if you allow impatience to take over. Strive to assert yourself confidently. This is a good cycle for throwing yourself into challenging, motivating projects and pouring more energy and passion into your chores, work, or pursuit of wellness. Today, avoid rushing through your duties or quickly becoming ticked off about something that’s not going your way, as expressing this or acting out can lead to bigger problems altogether.

Starting today, action-oriented Mars brings dynamic energy to your romance and pleasure sector, dear Scorpio, ensuring that life will not be dull until April 9th! During this cycle, you are likely to devote a lot of your energy and initiative to actively pursuing a rewarding love life, social amusement, hobbies, and pleasure in general. You have a competitive, more energetic and pleasingly assertive temperament during this transit. The passion in your romantic life can increase, but it can be either disruptive or stimulating. Overall, however, it's easier to express yourself and your desires. Choose your battles, and perhaps even your debates, wisely today. Aim to honor your long-term plans and strategies instead of blowing them through impulsive moves, which is the inclination with Mars and Jupiter in a minor but jarring aspect. That said, there is good energy with you for enjoying something different, unique, or simply fun. You genuinely need a break from the pressures of the outside world.

Mars enters your home and family sector today, dear Sagittarius, and will visit until April 9th. This influence brings a lot of energy to your domestic life -- possibly too much, at times! Used well, however, you can get plenty accomplished around the home, and you can be more assertive and forthright with family members. When stressed, there can be some argumentativeness or tension. You are especially protective of yourself and others, so be careful that you don't take on a defensive attitude that prevents others from getting close to you during this cycle. Directing energy into household projects and family activities can be constructive and satisfying. Conflicts with family may be constructive, too, if they serve to renew and revive your relationships, but make a point to avoid unnecessary or unhealthy conflict now. Today, you may want to watch for acting impatiently or in haste. Passions have a way of blowing up, and you may not be seeing much beyond the moment. Try not to impede your progress with an impulsive move. Otherwise, the day holds pleasing energy for enthusiasm.

Mars enters your communications sector today, dear Capricorn, and until April 9th, you'll have a lot more energy for personal interests. You may come across a little abruptly or impatiently at times, but you have much going on to keep you busy and engaged. This transit can speed up your daily routine in a variety of ways. In the weeks ahead, you're likely to feel competent and confident about what you're learning, sharing, and doing. Enthusiasm is strong for your ideas and connections. Mercury is retrograde in the same sector until March 20th, and there can be some communication challenges in the weeks ahead, but this Mars transit can fill you with the confidence to overcome these issues. While impatience with others, argumentativeness, and competitiveness are potential negatives of this position, the more aware you are of these potentials, the better you can control them. It's a good time for mental resourcefulness and sharpness, as well as for increased motivation to learn and connect with others. Energy levels are generally quite good during this transit.

Mars has occupied your sign in recent weeks, dear Aquarius, bringing energy and drive to your life, but also some impatience and pressure. Mars leaves your sign today, and life settles down a little. Still, with Mars in your resources sector from now until April 9th, you can experience a stronger-than-usual desire to bring abundance into your life. Taking action to make your life more secure is in the spotlight — you might decide to spend more time and energy working hard to stabilize your life in the weeks ahead. Achieving more financial independence motivates you, or you're compelled to take action on money-making ideas. Note, though, that this Mars transit can also be impulsive, and this applies most to spending habits, as the desire to accumulate objects can heighten. You might also be a little more possessive of people in your life during this cycle. Focus now on building your resources for the best results. Today brings continued enthusiasm for sharing or exploring your ideas. It can be challenging to juggle all that you want to do now, so aim to pace yourself.

Mars enters your sign today, dear Pisces, and it will transit Pisces until April 9th. During its recent journey through your privacy sector, Mars may have stirred all sorts of discoveries about buried "matter" such as anger or emotional slush. Still, it didn't always make it easy to release these things directly and straightforwardly. You may have even felt confined or low-energy at times during this recent cycle, and you may have been reflecting upon your goals. Now that Mars is in Pisces, there is more fire and dynamism to draw upon and express. You very easily get fired up, and have a stronger desire to get things done. This can also be a time when money comes in, as Mars rules your income sector. You feel more comfortable asserting yourself and pursuing your desires. Watch for impatience and brusqueness, however, as you can easily get carried away. Drive, enterprise, courage, and energy are in larger supply now. Today, pride or impatience can impede your progress. You may find it challenging to stick to the task, and the tendency to make rash choices or to act on anger too quickly is not just an inclination of yours — others can be quick to react. Poor decisions can be the result. Otherwise, your enthusiasm is strong.
